tagline: Where futures begin and wealth grows
homepage_message: Welcome to the FFA Investments member portal. Stay connected with club activities, track your investments, and grow your financial knowledge.
welcome_message: Welcome back! Check your dashboard for the latest updates on your investment portfolio and club activities.
dues_info: Membership dues are $50 per month. Payment options available through the portal.
meeting_schedule: Last Saturday of the month on Zoom at 9:00 AM EST
announcements:
Final Meeting of the Year — This Saturday at 9:00 AM (Zoom)
This Saturday marks our last official meeting of the year. We’ll gather at 9:00 AM via Zoom to close out the quarter, review updates, and prepare for a strong start to the new year.
Please plan to join and be on time — your participation helps us keep everything running smoothly.
